question: Which central body is primarily responsible for setting and enforcing food safety standards across all states in India, including Telangana and Andhra Pradesh?
options: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI)
correctAnswer: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI)
